description: One of the largest holding companies in the MENA region with significant cross-sector exposure.
riskTransmission: If KIPCO parent faces liquidity issues or credit downgrades, borrowing costs for Burgan Bank and URC may increase. Conversely, strong dividends from Burgan Bank are the primary cash flow source for KIPCO.

description: A major family conglomerate with historical influence over several large-cap Kuwaiti stocks.

keyHoldings.role: Telecom (Competitor to Zain, some cross-holdings in the broader market)

riskTransmission: Systemic risk often transmits through the Al-Kharafi group's pledged shares. Margin calls on one entity historically caused sell-offs in related entities.

description: A global logistics provider with a complex web of subsidiaries and recent strategic pivots.
riskTransmission: Agility's valuation is heavily tied to the performance of its DSV shares and the success of its Reem Mall project (via NREC/UPAC). Global logistics downturns impact NREC's ability to fund domestic projects.
